enum: Legislation, Regulation, Act related to the prevention of introduction and management of Invasive Alien Species (1 = YES, 0 = NO)
National Biodiversity Strategy and Action Plan (NBSAP) targets alignment to Aichi Biodiversity target 9 set out in the Strategic Plan for Biodiversity
National Biodiversity Strategy and Action Plans, national target reflecting Aichi Biodiversity Target 2 exists

title: Proportion of countries adopting relevant national legislation and adequately resourcing the prevention or control of invasive alien species
